scripts.test:go-compatibility: go vet ./... && go test -race ./... && go run ./cmd/opendart-tool compatibility --root openapi/openapi.yaml --baseline openapi/generated/openapi.bundle.yaml
scripts.bundle:opendart: redocly bundle openapi/openapi.yaml --config openapi/redocly.yaml --output openapi/generated/openapi.bundle.yaml --component-renaming-conflicts-severity error
scripts.verify:opendart: npm run test:opendart && npm run check:opendart && npm run lint:opendart && npm run check:opendart-bundle && npm run lint:opendart-bundle && npm run test:go-compatibility
